Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking Bootcamp

Learn how cyber attacks happen and how to defend systems like a professional. Start your journey into one of the fastest growing tech careers.

About our Bootcamp (coming soon)

Course Details

  • Duration: 8 Weeks (Intensive Cohort)
  • Mode: Online / Physical Hybrid
  • Level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Requirements: Laptop + Internet Access
  • Pricing: ₦85,000 ()

Why Learn Cybersecurity?

High Global Demand

Cybersecurity professionals are among the most sought-after tech experts worldwide.

Hands-On Skills

Learn practical techniques used by real security analysts and ethical hackers.

Career Opportunities

Explore roles like Security Analyst, Ethical Hacker, and Penetration Tester.
